steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The word “However” is a contrast marker that indicates the second part of the passage contradicts, questions, or qualifies the first part.

steps.title: Match the signal to the answer choices
steps.content:
D describes a result being presented and then a concern being raised about it, exactly matching the “However” structure.

The other three misidentify what the passage does —
  • A treats the fish species as central
  • B falsely claims a solution is offered
  • C invents a similarity
.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
